Wrath of Man (2021)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $27,466,489Details
International Box Office $76,446,916
Worldwide Box Office $103,913,405
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,838,130
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $3,257,652
Total $5,095,782
Further financial details...

Synopsis

H, a cold and mysterious character, works at a cash truck company responsible for moving hundreds of millions of dollars around Los Angeles each week. He surprises his coworkers during a heist in which he unexpectedly unleashes precision skills. The crew is left wondering who he is and where he came from. Soon, the marksman’s ultimate motive becomes clear as he takes dramatic and irrevocable steps to settle a score.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$8,309,007 (30.3% of total gross)
Legs:3.31 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:26.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$40,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,875 opening theaters/3,007 max. theaters, 5.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $32,300,803

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: May 7th, 2021 (Wide) by United Artists
International Releases: April 22nd, 2021 (Wide), released as Гнев человеческий (Russia (CIS))
April 29th, 2021 (Wide) (Australia)
April 29th, 2021 (Wide) (New Zealand)
May 8th, 2021 (Wide) (China)
May 14th, 2021 (Wide), released as Vyriškas įniršis (Wrath of Man (Cash Truck)) (Lithuania)
Video Release: May 25th, 2021 by United Artists Video
MPA Rating: R for strong violence throughout, pervasive language, and some sexual references.
(Rating bulletin 2657 (cert #52858), 11/25/2020)
Running Time: 118 minutes

Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action

Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

H, a cold and mysterious character, works at a cash truck company responsible for moving hundreds of millions of dollars around Los Angeles each week. He surprises his coworkers during a heist in which he unexpectedly unleashes precision skills. The crew is left wondering who he is and where he came from. Soon, the marksman’s ultimate motive becomes clear as he takes dramatic and irrevocable steps to settle a score.
